title: AI-Powered Student Mental Health Monitoring App
summary: Defined clinical protocols and led end-to-end delivery of an MVP tracking student stress, screen time, and personality via questionnaires for internal counsellor validation.
description: Led the full product lifecycle for a clinical mental health monitoring application — from competitive research across 8+ market tools, through clinical validation with professional counsellors, to production launch. Coordinated engineering, clinical, and design stakeholders while ensuring data-handling compliance. The platform surfaces early indicators of student stress through questionnaires and behavioural tracking, integrating directly into counsellor workflows.

title: Admin Panel & University Portal – AI Chatbot Integration
summary: Led delivery of an AI chatbot automating form-filling guidance, task reminders, and institutional updates across the student portal — driving a 25% increase in portal engagement.
description: Managed end-to-end delivery of an AI chatbot integrated into the university student portal. The chatbot automated routine admin queries including form-filling guidance, task reminders, and institutional updates, reducing manual staff workload and improving self-service adoption. Coordinated between engineering and institutional stakeholders, managed sprint planning, and tracked delivery milestones to ensure on-time launch.
